title: Food-Mood Tracking Log
description: Track what you eat alongside your mood and energy levels to discover patterns between nutrition and mental health.
instructions: Complete this log after each main meal or at the end of the day. Note what you ate, how you felt, and any gut symptoms. Over time, you'll see clear patterns emerge.

fields.label: What did you eat? (Be specific about main foods)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Oatmeal with berries, scrambled eggs, coffee with milk

fields.label: Any gut symptoms? (bloating, discomfort, nausea, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Mild bloating, or leave blank if none

fields.label: Glasses of water today so far

disclaimer: This food-mood log is an educational self-tracking tool. It is not a substitute for professional nutritional advice. If you have an eating disorder or are in crisis, call or text 988.
